presenceCondition:
(or (and __STRICT_ANSI__
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP)
    (and (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME
         ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP))
model:
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME () Bool
  true)
(define-fun ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP () Bool
  true)
reasoning: b62bd7b261b.c L24: '*p = *s' where p is uninitialized — same as TRANSFORMATION_43 (Pulse version). p is declared at L11 ('char *s, *p;') but never assigned before the while loop body at L24 uses it. The bug requires ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_CONF AND ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME AND ENABLE_FEATURE_MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP. PC: (STRICT_ANSI OR !STRICT_ANSI) AND MDEV_CONF AND MDEV_RENAME AND MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP — STRICT_ANSI cancels, leaving MDEV_CONF AND MDEV_RENAME AND MDEV_RENAME_REGEXP. Correctly constrained. New bug.
